APPLICATION_FORM.name: Visa Application Form
APPLICATION_FORM.description: Completed and signed Schengen visa application form
APPLICATION_FORM.notes: Must be signed in two places

PASSPORT_CURRENT.name: Current Passport
PASSPORT_CURRENT.description: Valid passport with at least 3 months validity beyond return date
PASSPORT_CURRENT.notes: Must have at least 2 blank pages

PASSPORT_PREVIOUS.name: Previous Passports
PASSPORT_PREVIOUS.description: Previous passports with Schengen visas if applicable

PHOTOS.name: Biometric Photos
PHOTOS.notes: White background, taken within last 6 months

ID_CARD_COPY.name: National ID Card Copy
ID_CARD_COPY.description: Copy of national identity card (both sides)

TRAVEL_INSURANCE.name: Travel Medical Insurance
TRAVEL_INSURANCE.description: Travel insurance with minimum 30,000 EUR coverage
TRAVEL_INSURANCE.notes: Must cover medical expenses, hospitalization, and repatriation

TRANSPORT_RESERVATION.name: Round-trip Transport Reservation
TRANSPORT_RESERVATION.description: Flight or other transport booking showing entry and exit
TRANSPORT_RESERVATION.notes: Reservation is sufficient; paid tickets are not required at application

ACCOMMODATION.name: Accommodation Reservation
ACCOMMODATION.description: Hotel bookings or proof of accommodation for entire stay

ITINERARY.name: Travel Itinerary
ITINERARY.description: Day-by-day travel plan if visiting multiple locations

EMPLOYMENT_LETTER.name: Employment Letter
EMPLOYMENT_LETTER.description: Letter from employer stating position, salary, and start date

APPROVED_LEAVE.name: Approved Leave Letter
APPROVED_LEAVE.description: Official approval of leave from employer

SOCIAL_SECURITY.name: Social Security Record
SOCIAL_SECURITY.description: Employment history from social security authority

BANK_STATEMENTS.name: Bank Statements
BANK_STATEMENTS.notes: Should show sufficient funds for the trip

SPONSOR_LETTER.name: Sponsorship Letter
SPONSOR_LETTER.description: Letter from sponsor declaring financial support

SPONSOR_BANK_STATEMENTS.name: Sponsor Bank Statements
SPONSOR_BANK_STATEMENTS.description: Sponsor bank statements for last 3-6 months

SPONSOR_INCOME_PROOF.name: Sponsor Income Documents
SPONSOR_INCOME_PROOF.description: Proof of sponsor income (payslips, tax returns)

PREVIOUS_VISAS.name: Previous Schengen Visa Copies
PREVIOUS_VISAS.description: Copies of previous Schengen visas if applicable

EMPLOYER_TAX_PLATE.name: Employer Tax Registration
EMPLOYER_TAX_PLATE.notes: May be required depending on nationality

EMPLOYER_TRADE_REGISTRY.name: Employer Trade Registry Record
EMPLOYER_TRADE_REGISTRY.notes: May be required depending on nationality

EMPLOYER_SIGNATURE_CIRCULAR.name: Employer Signature Circular
EMPLOYER_SIGNATURE_CIRCULAR.notes: May be required depending on nationality

PROPERTY_DEED.name: Property Ownership Documents
PROPERTY_DEED.description: Proof of property ownership if applicable
PROPERTY_DEED.notes: Can strengthen ties to home country

TAX_RETURNS.name: Tax Returns
TAX_RETURNS.description: Recent tax returns for self-employed applicants

STUDENT_CERTIFICATE.name: Student Certificate
STUDENT_CERTIFICATE.description: Enrolment certificate from your school or university

request-employer-docs.name: Request employer documents
request-employer-docs.description: Request employment letter, leave approval, and payslips from HR

obtain-bank-statements.name: Obtain bank statements
obtain-bank-statements.description: Get recent bank statements from your bank

purchase-insurance.name: Purchase travel insurance
purchase-insurance.description: Buy travel medical insurance meeting Schengen requirements

confirm-reservations.name: Confirm reservations
confirm-reservations.description: Finalize and print transport and accommodation reservations

final-review.name: Final dossier review
final-review.description: Review all documents, make copies, organize dossier

request-employer-company-docs.name: Request employer company documents
request-employer-company-docs.description: Request company tax plate, trade registry, and signature circular if required

gr-mfa-general.title: Ministry of Foreign Affairs — visa information
gr-mfa-general.notes: General ministry entry point carried over from an earlier version of this template. It has not been checked against a current document list.

greece.nationalityVaries: Requirements may vary based on your nationality and the visa centre processing your application.
greece.visaCentre: Applications for Greece are handled by an authorized visa centre in many countries.
greece.peakSeason: Appointment slots may be limited during peak travel seasons.
